7+ Yrs Experience

✦ About Me

The Art of Every Cup

I'm Willson Rai, a passionate Head Barista and freelancer from Lalitpur, Nepal. With over seven years in the coffee and hospitality industry, I've grown from pulling my first espresso shot to leading teams, training new baristas, and creating visual identities for cafés and restaurants.

Beyond the bar, I wear the hat of a creative freelancer — designing menus, crafting social media content, and building brand identities. Coffee and creativity flow through everything I do.

✦ Journey

Work Experience

Dec 2024 — May 2026
Head Barista
Feels Café · Jhamsikhel, Lalitpur
  • Maintained consistency in espresso quality and latte art across all shifts
  • Managed inventory, stock ordering, and supplier coordination
  • Trained new hires and interns on machines and grinders
  • Calibrated grinders and espresso machines for consistency
  • Built a positive, high-energy team culture under service pressure
  • Created in-house graphics for promotions, seasonal offers, and social media
  • Produced print-ready and digital assets for daily café operations
2020 — 2024
Barista
Chaasuwa Restaurant · Satdobato, Lalitpur
  • Brewed coffees as per restaurant standards and menu specifications
  • Served guests with attentive, professional service
  • Set up bar stations and maintained sanitation across bar and dining areas
  • Regularly cleaned and maintained espresso machine performance
2018 — 2020
Barista
Jhamel Beats · Jhamsikhel, Lalitpur
  • Worked as a barista within a medium-sized team
  • Maintained a clean and well-organized bar environment
  • Brewed and served coffee to guests with professionalism
  • Expanded knowledge of different coffee types and techniques

✦ Expertise

Core Skills

☕
Espresso Extraction & Dialing In
Precision extraction ratios, grind calibration, shot timing and quality control across high-volume shifts.
🥛
Latte Art & Milk Texturing
Microfoam technique, free-pour patterns, rosettes, hearts, and custom designs for elevated guest experiences.
⚗️
Manual Brewing Methods
V60 pour-over, French press, AeroPress — brewing variables mastered for each method's optimal output.
🎨
Menu Design & Layout
Print-ready and digital menu design, promotional graphics, seasonal campaign visuals for café branding.
👥
Team Training & Leadership
Training interns and new hires on machines, workflow, and quality standards. Building team culture under pressure.
📦
Inventory & POS Management
Stock ordering, supplier coordination, cash handling, and POS system operations in busy café environments.

✦ Available for Hire

Freelance Services

  • 01
    Barista Consulting
    Menu development, barista training programs, equipment calibration, and workflow optimization for café startups and established venues.
  • 02
    Café & Menu Design
    Beautiful, print-ready menus and digital assets tailored to your brand's identity using Canva and layout design principles.
  • 03
    Social Media Content
    Eye-catching promotional graphics, seasonal campaigns, and consistent visual branding for restaurant and café social channels.
  • 04
    Barista Training Sessions
    One-on-one or group training for aspiring baristas — covering espresso theory, latte art, manual brewing, and customer interaction.
  • 05
    Guest Barista & Events
    Available for pop-up coffee experiences, hospitality events, brand activations, and cupping workshops.

Let's work together.
